plugin.name: MW_Hello
plugin.author: Proteles
plugin.purpose: Miniwindow spike demo: a static drawn panel

muclient.script:
local win = "mw_hello_" .. GetPluginID()
-- BGR colour ints (red low byte) — see MUSHColour / WindowCreate docs. local BG = 0x1A1A1A -- near-black local FRAME = 0x808080 -- grey local TITLE = 0x00D7FF -- amber (BGR) local TEXT = 0xE0E0E0 -- light grey local ACCENT = 0x40C040 -- green
function draw() -- Clear to the background (full-window fill = the standard "clear"). WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_fill, 0, 0, 0, 0, BG) -- A 1px frame just inside the edge. WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_frame, 0, 0, 0, 0, FRAME) -- Title + body using two fonts. WindowText(win, "title", "Proteles Miniwindows", 10, 8, 0, 0, TITLE) WindowLine(win, 8, 28, WindowInfo(win, 3) - 8, 28, ACCENT, miniwin.pen_solid, 1) WindowText(win, "body", "WindowCreate + RectOp + Text + Line", 10, 36, 0, 0, TEXT) WindowText(win, "body", "all drawn natively, antialiased.", 10, 52, 0, 0, TEXT) end
function OnPluginInstall() -- 320x80, anchored top-left of the output, opaque. WindowCreate(win, 0, 0, 320, 80, miniwin.pos_top_left, 0, 0) WindowFont(win, "title", "Menlo", 13, true, false, false, false) WindowFont(win, "body", "Menlo", 11, false, false, false, false) draw() WindowShow(win, true) end
function OnPluginConnect() draw() end
